name: ecomacademy-skills
description: Claude Code skills and plugins for Shopify merchants — by Ecommerce Academy.

plugins.name: eca-pdp
plugins.description: Ecommerce Academy Product Detail Page (ECA PDP). Connects to a Shopify store via the Shopify CLI, duplicates the live theme into a development theme, and installs a high-converting product page template built for Horizon.

plugins.name: eca-promotion
plugins.description: Ecommerce Academy Promotion Builder. Plan and build a complete promotional sale campaign — offer, email/SMS, paid ads, on-site changes, and a dated Go-Live timeline.

plugins.name: eca-ecommerce-agent
plugins.description: Ecommerce Academy skills bundle — brand intelligence, email marketing campaigns, competitor analysis, Meta ad copywriting, customer persona building, SEO/AI blog writing, UGC video scripts, and SEO/AI store audits. New skills are added here over time; install this one plugin to stay current with all of them.  What's new (v1.6.0): Added in SEO / AIO Update

plugins.name: eca-operations-agent
plugins.description: Ecommerce Academy Operations Coworker — turn the repeatable tasks in your business into reusable Claude skills with the TEACH framework.
